reason: Package 3 of the UI/UX consolidation approved in UI-UX-SPEC.md (see DECISIONS.md, 2026-07-12). This package turns the wheel's inline toast into a reusable ToastHost control (self-theming dark backdrop, self-timing 4s / 8s for danger and undo, a small role-colored dot for Success/Warning/Danger/Info, an optional Undo link, hover-to-freeze) and routes all overlay feedback through it, and it replaces the undocumented glyph language (⧉ ➜ ⇅ ≡ ▶ ↕ ↩) with plain words (Copy, Move, Sort, Text, Run, Add, Reorder, Undone) in both toasts and drop badges. It is a wording-and-token change on the existing feedback surface: no new screen or dialog composition, layout and behavior unchanged, colors from the palette roles added in package 1. The wording-vs-glyph decision and the single-channel toast policy are the ones the owner already approved in the spec; per-package mockups add nothing here.
approvedBy: Ivan Larin (repo owner) via chat request on 2026-07-12
